title: Crispy Honey Mustard Salmon & Grains
summary: Sticky mustard-glazed salmon on top of zingy lemony grains with wilted greens. A weeknight winner that’s on the table in 15.

method.description: Place a frying pan over a medium heat with a drizzle of olive oil. Once hot, add the salmon skin-side down and cook undisturbed for 5-6 mins, until it’s about three-quarters done.
Meanwhile, boil a full kettle. Put the spinach in a colander and pour over the boiling water to wilt it. Once cool enough to handle, squeeze out any excess water.
Roughly chop the dill. Zest ½ the lemon. Warm the grains if needed, then toss them with the spinach, dill, basil leaves and lemon zest. Season with salt and set aside.
Flip the salmon and add the mustard and honey straight into the pan. Let it bubble for a minute, then spoon the glaze over the fish as it finishes cooking through.
Squeeze a little lemon juice into the glaze to loosen it. Share the grains onto plates, top with the salmon and spoon over the sticky mustard glaze.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
